title: Coffee_XiaoGuan's Tool Outlines
description: Added a glowing outline effect to the tool, making it look more aesthetically pleasing.
body:
# Coffee_XiaoGuan's Tool Outlines
Added a glowing outline effect to the tool to make it look more attractive. **The tool's glow needs to support PBR Shader**. For example a Nostalgia Shader can be used.
![Coffee_XiaoGuan's Tool Outlines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe15d5b6b7a96de2372ef576aa200b3336dd95d3_0.webp)![Coffee_XiaoGuan's Tool Outlines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a249e5f5ccd92b9c8662f4caef7b720c836701e_0.webp)
![Coffee_XiaoGuan's Tool Outlines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6667a8aa09ec589d38da94e6e6e642afd8f29bf3_0.webp)
